nasb.text: After these things Jesus went away to the other side of the Sea of Galilee (or Tiberias).

esv.text: After this Jesus went away to the other side of the Sea of Galilee, which is the Sea of Tiberias.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，耶穌渡過加利利海，就是提比里亞海。

ccb.text: 事后，耶稣渡过加利利湖，就是提比哩亚海。

csbs.text: 这些事以后，耶稣渡过加利利湖，也就是太巴列湖，到对岸去。
